title: Minimum Number of Refueling Stops
input_format: An integer `target`, an integer `startFuel`, and a 2D array `stations` where `stations[i] = [position_i, fuel_i]`.
output_format: The minimum number of refueling stops required to reach the target.
constraints:
- `1 <= target, startFuel <= 10^9`
- `0 <= stations.length <= 500`
- `1 <= position_i < position_{i+1} < target`
- `1 <= fuel_i < 10^9`
function_signature: function minRefuelStops(target: number, startFuel: number, stations: number[][]): number {}
